items.title: North Korea's Forgetten Upset Over Italy Joins Top 100 World Cup Moments List
items.summary: The World Cup is defined by memorable moments. Counting down to the top 100 of all-time.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: 'Patidar's intent becoming their identity' - RCB's batting tempo impresses Finch, Rayudu
items.summary: The RCB captain is averaging 55.50 and striking at 213.46 this season, and has hit 21 sixes and 12 fours
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Liverpool have star power, but PSG show it takes more than talent to truly sparkle
items.summary: Liverpool's UCL journey ended with a whimper Tuesday at the hands of a clinical Paris Saint-Germain.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
